title: Kimetsu No Yaiba x Epic Fight compaibity
description: This mod allows Kimetsu No Yaiba NPC's to use the Epic Fight animations and also gives you the Epic Fight animations with all the blood demon arts and nichirin swords.
body:
### DISCLAIMAR
*EPIC FIGHT DOES NOT SUPPORT 1.16.5 ANYMORE*

MAKE SURE YOU USE: EpicFightMod-16.5.13.jar (1.16 version)

With this mod you still need the Epic Fight and [Kimetsu No Yaiba](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/demonslayer) mod. 

This mod allows Kimetsu No Yaiba NPC's to use the Epic Fight animations and also gives you the Epic Fight animations with all the blood demon arts and nichirin swords.
